title: Bank Vault
description: Multiblock bank vault with a searchable, tabbed GUI: mass storage, NBT-exact stacking, groups, upgrades to 20M items.
body:
# Bank Vault

**Kill the chest monster. Once and for all.**

A multiblock **bank vault** with a searchable, tabbed GUI for mass item storage — built to be the last storage room you ever need.

## Why Bank Vault?

- **The chest monster ends here.** One structure, one GUI, every item you own — searchable, sorted into category tabs, and stacking into the millions. No more warehouse of double chests and signs.
- **Early-game accessible.** A full vault costs nothing but iron — if you have an iron farm, you have a vault. No blaze powder, no ender eyes, no diamond-pickaxe gatekeeping like an ender chest.
- **Share it — or don't.** Unlike an ender chest, a vault can be shared: invite friends or your whole team, hand out permission ranks, and run one bank together. Solo players get their own private bank from the very same structure.
- **Build one everywhere.** Vaults work like ender chests: they're access points, not the storage itself. Put a 3x3 at your base, your mine, your outpost — every formed vault opens your bank.
- **Farms love it.** Hoppers insert directly into the vault, so it's the perfect endpoint for any farm — aim your collection line at it and the loot lands in your bank, already categorized.
- **Movable — with intent.** A vault can be mined and relocated, but at nine blocks it's deliberately a little more effort than pocketing an ender chest. Vaults are meant to be *built into* your farms and bases, not carried around.

## How it works
Craft 9 **Bank Vault Blocks** and place them in a 3x3 -- the structure forms automatically. Right-click any formed vault to open **your own bank** (Ender-chest model: vaults are shared access points, so a whole server can use one structure and every player sees their own storage).

## Features
- **Massive storage** -- starts at 2,048 items; feed it chests as upgrades (up to 64) for a capacity of 20,000,000 items.
- **Tabbed item browser** -- 18 category tabs, live search, scrollable grid, two smart sort modes plus A-Z and count.
- **NBT-exact storage** -- enchanted books, potions, tipped arrows, written books, filled shulkers and backpacks keep their exact data. Items stack only when identical; nothing is ever flattened or lost.
- **Quick Unload** -- drop a filled shulker box, bundle, or Travelers' Backpack on the unload slot and its contents flow into the vault; the emptied container is returned.
- **Built-in 3x3 crafting grid** and full inventory panel, so the vault doubles as a workbench.
- **Groups** -- invite players to a shared bank with permission levels (Deposit / Member / Master / Owner): `/bank invite`, `/bank accept`, `/bank leave`, and more.
- **Fully data-driven categories** -- tabs, item assignments, and both sort orders live in `config/bankvault/` JSON files. Edit them, run `/bank reload`, done. Delete a file and the default regenerates on next launch.
- **Soft integrations** -- Trinkets slots in the inventory panel and Travelers' Backpack support, no hard dependencies.

## Commands
`/bank` (info) - `/bank list` - `/bank invite <player> [level]` - `/bank accept` / `decline` - `/bank leave` - `/bank setlevel` / `kick` / `transfer` / `disband` - `/bank upgrade` - `/bank withdraw <count> <item>` - `/bank reload` (op)
